summary: Completed full testing of Smart Partner Ecosystem Pack. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Type-aware form adapts based on Service/Product/Hybrid selection with appropriate fields and notes.
seed_data_creation: Created test partners via API tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Smart Partner Ecosystem Pack fully tested. Backend has full CRUD with type-specific flags (has_catalog, has_inventory, quote_based). Frontend at /admin/partner-ecosystem shows type-aware form that adapts based on partner type selection.

GET /api/admin/partners-smart - Lists al.details: Returns list of partners with total_jobs and completed_jobs stats

POST /api/admin/partners-smart - Creates.details: Creates partners with correct type-specific flags (service: quote_based=true, has_catalog=false; product: has_catalog=true, has_inventory=true; hybrid: all flags true)

GET /api/admin/partners-smart/stats/summ.details: Returns total_partners, active_partners, and by_type counts (service, product, hybrid)

PUT /api/admin/partners-smart/{id}/statu.details: Updates status to active/paused/suspended, rejects invalid status with 400

PUT /api/admin/partners-smart/{id}/servi.details: Updates specific_services array and persists correctly

/admin/partner-ecosystem page renders wi.details: Page shows Total Partners, Active, Service Partners, Product Partners stats cards. Table/Cards toggle works correctly.

Add Partner form shows type selection (S.details: Three type selection buttons with icons and descriptions

Service Partner type shows Specific Serv.details: Specific Services textarea visible with amber 'Service Partner Note' about capability-based pricing

Product Partner type shows blue note abo.details: Blue 'Product Partner Settings' note visible explaining catalog/SKU management

Form adapts fields based on partner_type.details: Service: shows Specific Services + amber note. Product: shows blue note only. Hybrid: shows both Specific Services + amber note + blue note
